quality.notes: The description clearly outlines the environmental adaptation and advantage on specific saving throws.

effects.detail: Can breathe normally in any environment.
Advantage on saving throws against harmful gases and vapors (examples: cloudkill, stinking cloud, inhaled poisons, breath weapons).

mechanics.potential_ambiguity: The term 'harmful gases and vapors' is slightly vague but the examples provided anchor the power level appropriately for an Uncommon item.
